name: X-Golf at American Family Field | Year-Round Golf Simulator Suites & Events
address: Left Field Corner Club Level, 1 Brewers Way, Milwaukee, WI 53214
about: X-Golf American Family Field offers year-round indoor golf simulation with 7 simulator bays. The venue combines high-tech golf simulators with a full-service bar and restaurant, creating an entertainment space suitable for play, practice, and events. Pricing is structured per simulator, per hour, with rates varying by day of the week and time. It is designed for a diverse clientele, from individual golfers and families to large corporate groups seeking a unique event venue.
why_golfers_like_it: Unparalleled accuracy and realism from state-of-the-art simulator technology
Convenient location at American Family Field with great views
Flexible hours and availability for play, lessons, and leagues
Ability to play famous golf courses from around the world
Full-service bar and premium food and beverages on-site

food_and_drink.notes: Premium Food & Beverages, including shareable bites, delicious appetizers, snacks, and pizzas. Full catering menu available.
Full Liquor service, with beer by the glass or on tap, cocktails, and wines.

simulator_hardware.notes: State of the art system using camera systems, infrared lasers, impact sensors, and advanced gaming software.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, club sets are available for rent for $10 per hour on non-game days. The venue also offers club fitting services.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drink are not permitted as X-Golf American Family Field has a full-service bar and kitchen offering premium food and beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Generally, it takes one hour for an individual to play 18 holes. Each additional person will add approximately one hour to complete their 18 holes, depending on skill level and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, X-Golf American Family Field is welcoming to children of all ages and offers a family-friendly environment.
